queries: E2E pipeline Data Quality and Validation Techniques 2023
action.query: E2E pipeline Data Quality and Validation Techniques 2023

annotations.title: Data Quality Testing: Techniques & Best Practices in 2026 | Atlan
Data pipeline quality: development and validation of a quality assessment tool for data-driven algorithms and artificial intelligence in healthcare - PMC
8. Data Validation in Pipelines - Data Pipelines Pocket Reference [Book]
End-to-end Pipeline Monitoring | The GitLab Handbook
Tips for a Successful E2E Testing Strategy | mabl
How to Evaluate E2E Model Performance - HogoNext

content.text:
Ensuring data quality and validation in end-to-end (E2E) pipelines is crucial for maintaining the integrity and reliability of data-driven applications. Below are several authoritative and recent sources that provide insights into this topic:

1. **Data Quality Testing: Techniques & Best Practices in 2026 | Atlan**
   This comprehensive guide discusses systematic processes for validating data accuracy, completeness, consistency, and reliability across ETL/ELT pipelines. It introduces six core techniques: null set testing, boundary value testing, completeness testing, uniqueness testing, referential integrity testing, and framework testing. ([atlan.com](https://atlan.com/data-quality-testing/?utm_source=openai))

2. **Data pipeline quality: development and validation of a quality assessment tool for data-driven algorithms and artificial intelligence in healthcare - PMC**
   This study presents the development of the DATA-CARE tool, designed to assess the quality of data pipelines in healthcare applications. It outlines quality domains and criteria, including data acquisition, dataset size and balance, missing data, preprocessing, and feature derivation, providing a structured approach to evaluating data pipeline quality. ([pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12878310/?utm_source=openai))

3. **8. Data Validation in Pipelines - Data Pipelines Pocket Reference [Book]**
   This chapter emphasizes the importance of early and frequent data validation throughout the steps of an ELT pipeline. It advocates for integrating validation processes at each stage to ensure data integrity and prevent issues from propagating downstream. ([oreilly.com](https://www.oreilly.com/library/view/data-pipelines-pocket/9781492087823/ch08.html?utm_source=openai))

4. **10 Data Pipeline Testing Best Practices 2024 | Eyer**
   This article outlines best practices for testing data pipelines, including performing integration testing to ensure smooth data flow, conducting end-to-end testing to validate the entire pipeline, and automating tests to improve efficiency. It also highlights the importance of using real-world scenario data and monitoring the flow to identify potential issues. ([eyer.ai](https://www.eyer.ai/blog/10-data-pipeline-testing-best-practices-2024/?utm_source=openai))

5. **Mastering Data Pipeline Data Validation | Number Analytics**
   This resource delves into strategies for ensuring data accuracy and reliability in pipelines. It discusses various validation techniques and best practices to maintain data quality, emphasizing the need for a multi-faceted approach to data validation. ([numberanalytics.com](https://www.numberanalytics.com/blog/mastering-data-pipeline-data-validation?utm_source=openai))

6. **End-to-end Pipeline Monitoring | The GitLab Handbook**
   GitLab's handbook provides an overview of their E2E monitoring tools and practices, detailing the monitoring of test pipelines, their frequency, and the channels used for reporting results. It offers practical insights into implementing E2E pipeline monitoring. ([handbook.gitlab.com](https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/engineering/testing/end-to-end-pipeline-monitoring/?utm_source=openai))

7. **Tips for a Successful E2E Testing Strategy | mabl**
   This article offers guidance on developing an effective E2E testing strategy, emphasizing the importance of simulating real user scenarios, implementing data-driven and agile testing approaches, and efficiently testing user journeys throughout the development pipeline. ([mabl.com](https://www.mabl.com/articles/tips-for-a-successful-e2e-testing-strategy?utm_source=openai))

8. **How to Evaluate E2E Model Performance | HogoNext**
   This resource outlines a multi-stage procedure for evaluating E2E model performance, including data understanding and preparation, component-level evaluation, and integrated system testing. It emphasizes the importance of using representative datasets and conducting thorough testing to ensure model reliability. ([hogonext.com](https://hogonext.com/how-to-evaluate-e2e-model-performance/?utm_source=openai))

These sources provide a solid foundation for understanding and implementing data quality and validation techniques in E2E pipelines, offering both theoretical frameworks and practical applications.
